title: Ore UI's Style Interface
description: Change the style of the interfaces to those of the Bedrock version for Vanilla 16x.

<summary>OreUI for Java!</summary>

## OreUI for Java!

Makes UI look the same as the new Bedrock UI!

A dark interface, a clean design, an exact resemblance.

The perfect style of OreUI, at home.
